proposed_answer: Include several quick releases and keep scissors close in case the tie becomes overwhelming.
proposed_question: What emergency-release precautions does Rope365 recommend for a mummification tie?
reason: This keeps the source's two explicit release precautions together and avoids adding unshown construction advice.
support_evidence: | Day 167: Mummification – Wrap the entire body to create a full-body restraint. Add more rope to create a cocoon by wrapping the body progressively more and more. Make sure to use a few quick-releases and keep the scissors close in case the tie becomes overwhelming. Inspirations and Resources |

proposed_answer: Inspect its lashings or welds because rotational force can cause shearing.
proposed_question: What safety inspection does Rope365 recommend for a center-weighted tripod, and why?
reason: This preserves the source's specific failure mechanism and corresponding inspection target in a standalone answer.
support_evidence: Tripods also have a unique weakness you should pay attention to. The rotational force of a center-weighted load can cause shearing, similar to twisting the top off of a bottle of soda. You should regularly inspect the lashing/welding of any center-weighted tripod for this reason, and this isa big reason why many of the steel-topper providers have moved to a more distributed mounting pattern.

proposed_answer: Their apparent agreement may not amount to informed consent in that state.
proposed_question: Why does Tethered Together recommend avoiding mid-scene renegotiation when someone is in subspace or not clear-minded?
reason: This attributes the event's recommendation and retains its informed-consent rationale without generalizing policy into law.
support_evidence: - Depending on all participants’ state of mind, we recommend that you don’t renegotiate in the middle of your scene. When a person is in subspace or otherwise not in a clear state of mind, you may not have informed consent even though that person may appear to agree in the heat of the moment.
